---
title: "DSCI 532 individual Assignment"
subtitle: Introduction to `Stan` and Bayes' Rule
output:
  pdf_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: '4'
    latex_engine: xelatex 
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: '4'
    df_print: paged
---

```{r}
library(shiny)
library(plotly)
library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)
library(readr)
library(rsconnect)

rsconnect::writeManifest()
# ---------------- DATA ----------------
csv_path <- "data/raw/ncr_ride_bookings.csv"
uber <- read_csv(csv_path)

names(uber) <- gsub(" ", "_", names(uber))
uber$Date <- as.Date(uber$Date)

# Convert numeric columns
uber$Booking_Value <- as.numeric(uber$Booking_Value)
uber$Driver_Ratings <- as.numeric(uber$Driver_Ratings)

uber$Issue_Reason <- coalesce(
  uber$Reason_for_cancelling_by_Customer,
  uber$Driver_Cancellation_Reason,
  uber$Incomplete_Rides_Reason,
  ""
)

# ---------------- HELPER ----------------
shiny_human_format <- function(num) {
  num <- as.numeric(num)
  if(abs(num) >= 1e9) {
    return(paste0(round(num/1e9), "B"))
  } else if(abs(num) >= 1e6) {
    return(paste0(round(num/1e6), "M"))
  } else if(abs(num) >= 1e3) {
    return(paste0(round(num/1e3), "K"))
  } else {
    return(as.character(round(num)))
  }
}

# ---------------- UI ----------------
ui <- fluidPage(
  tabsetPanel(
    tabPanel("Original Dashboard",
      sidebarLayout(
        sidebarPanel(
          sliderInput(
            "slider",
            "Date range",
            min = min(uber$Date),
            max = max(uber$Date),
            value = c(min(uber$Date), max(uber$Date))
          ),
          actionButton("reset_btn", "Reset Filters")
        ),
        mainPanel(
          fluidRow(
            column(4,
              wellPanel(
                h5("Total Bookings"),
                textOutput("total_bookings")
              )
            ),
            column(4,
              wellPanel(
                h5("Canceled Bookings"),
                textOutput("canceled_bookings")
              )
            )
          ),
          fluidRow(
            column(12,
              plotlyOutput("pie_chart", height = "335px"),
              plotlyOutput("line_chart", height = "300px"),
            )
          )
        )
      )
    )
  )
)

# ---------------- SERVER ----------------
server <- function(input, output, session) {

  # ---------------- FILTERED DATA ----------------
  filtered_data <- reactive({
    df <- uber %>% filter(Date >= input$slider[1] & Date <= input$slider[2])
    selected <- input$vehicle_type
    if(!is.null(selected) && !"All" %in% selected) {
      df <- df %>% filter(Vehicle_Type %in% selected)
    }
    df
  })

  # ---------------- RESET FILTERS ----------------
  observeEvent(input$reset_btn, {
    updateSliderInput(session, "slider", value = c(min(uber$Date), max(uber$Date)))
    updateSelectInput(session, "vehicle_type", selected = "All")
  })

  # ---------------- KPI VALUES ----------------
  output$total_bookings <- renderText({
    shiny_human_format(nrow(filtered_data()))
  })

  output$total_revenue <- renderText({
    shiny_human_format(sum(filtered_data()$Booking_Value, na.rm = TRUE))
  })

  output$canceled_bookings <- renderText({
    df <- filtered_data()
    count <- sum(df$Cancelled_Rides_by_Driver == 1, na.rm = TRUE) +
             sum(df$Cancelled_Rides_by_Customer == 1, na.rm = TRUE)
    shiny_human_format(count)
  })

  # ---------------- CHARTS ----------------

  output$line_chart <- renderPlotly({
    df <- filtered_data() %>%
      group_by(Date) %>%
      summarise(total_value = sum(Booking_Value, na.rm = TRUE))
    
    plot_ly(df, x = ~Date, y = ~total_value, type = "scatter", mode = "lines+markers")
  })

  output$pie_chart <- renderPlotly({
    df <- uber %>% filter(Date >= input$slider[1] & Date <= input$slider[2])
    df_agg <- df %>%
      group_by(Vehicle_Type) %>%
      summarise(total_value = sum(Booking_Value, na.rm = TRUE))
    
    plot_ly(df_agg, labels = ~Vehicle_Type, values = ~total_value, type = "pie", textinfo = "label+percent")
  })

  # ---------------- AI Dashboard placeholders ----------------
  output$qc_data_table <- renderTable({
    filtered_data()  # replace with AI filtered data in Python
  })

  output$qc_pie_chart <- renderPlotly({
    df <- filtered_data()
    df_agg <- df %>%
      group_by(Vehicle_Type) %>%
      summarise(total_value = sum(Booking_Value, na.rm = TRUE))
    
    plot_ly(df_agg, labels = ~Vehicle_Type, values = ~total_value, type = "pie", textinfo = "label+percent")
  })

  output$qc_line_chart <- renderPlotly({
    df <- filtered_data() %>%
      group_by(Date) %>%
      summarise(total_value = sum(Booking_Value, na.rm = TRUE))
    
    plot_ly(df, x = ~Date, y = ~total_value, type = "scatter", mode = "lines+markers")
  })

  output$download_data <- downloadHandler(
    filename = function() { "uber_filtered_data.csv" },
    content = function(file) {
      write_csv(filtered_data(), file)
    }
  )
}

# ---------------- RUN APP ----------------
shinyApp(ui = ui, server = server)

```
